Hero.headline: Your money shouldn't ask for permission to cross borders.
Hero.body: Convert USD or EUR to Colombian Pesos or USDT in hours. No intermediary banks. No Western Union. Just WhatsApp.

Footer.description: Premium currency brokerage operating via WhatsApp. Speed, security, and legal backing.
Footer.amlDisclaimer: ⚖️ FBS operates as a brokerage service facilitator. All transactions comply with current AML and KYC regulations.
Footer.rights: © 2026 Full Broker Services. All rights reserved.

HowItWorks.title: Your Money, Without Borders — in 3 Steps
HowItWorks.subtitle: We simplify international finances with a transparent and exclusive process.
HowItWorks.step1Body: Start a chat on WhatsApp. Tell us how much you want to move and to which currency. We give you the preferential rate instantly.
HowItWorks.step2Body: Make the Wire or SEPA transfer to our verified corporate accounts in the USA or Europe. Full legal backing.
HowItWorks.step3Body: In a matter of hours, we disburse COP to Bancolombia/Nequi/Daviplata or USDT (TRC20/ERC20) to your wallet.

Archetypes.title: Who FBS is For
Archetypes.t1_head: Collect your wires without losing 6% in bank fees.
Archetypes.t1_body: You work for clients in the US, Canada, or Europe, and every wire you receive passes through 2 or 3 banks that take a cut. With FBS, that money travels directly to you: in USDT to your wallet or in COP to your Bancolombia account, no intermediaries, in hours.
Archetypes.t2_head: Tuition and living expenses from Europe or the US, without delays.
Archetypes.t2_body: Your parents or partner send you money from Spain, Germany, or France. With SEPA Instant or Wire, we receive and convert to pesos so you have the money in your account in Colombia the same day. No Western Union, no lines.
Archetypes.t3_head: Send Euros to Colombia. Your family receives them today.
Archetypes.t3_body: You live in Europe and want to send money to Colombia regularly. SEPA Instant brings us your euros in seconds. We convert them at the best market rate and deposit them into the account you specify in Colombia.
Archetypes.t4_head: B2B operations up to $50K/month. Full traceability.
Archetypes.t4_body: Your company imports, exports, or pays international suppliers. FBS gives you corporate access with a dedicated account, legal mandate backing, reports for each operation, and ample limits. No endless KYC: an assigned broker.
Archetypes.t5_head: Liquidity in USDT at market price. Fast.
Archetypes.t5_body: You need liquidity in USDT TRC20 or ERC20 to arbitrage between platforms or move capital at speed. FBS gives you preferential volume rates, without exchange delays, with a broker available in real time.

Trust.b4_sub: Regulatory compliance in Colombia and USA

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.a1: Typically between 15 and 45 minutes once the receipt of your funds is confirmed in our US or European accounts. USDT deliveries are almost immediate. If to Bancolombia or Nequi accounts, maximum 2 business hours.
Faq.a2: No. The spread is already included in the exchange rate given to you by the broker on WhatsApp. The rate you see in the calculator is very close to the real one. The agreed amount is exactly the amount you receive.
Faq.q3: Do I have to open an account or create a login?
Faq.a3: No. We operate a 'concierge' model. You only need to write us on WhatsApp. We perform KYC validations via chat the first time (ID document) and then you transact freely with your assigned broker.
Faq.q4: What are the minimum and maximum amounts?
Faq.a4: The minimum amount per operation is $500 USD/EUR. The standard daily maximum amount is $50,000 USD. However, for B2B corporate accounts we can handle larger volumes upon prior request and strict legal mandate.

FinalCta.title: Ready for your first operation?
FinalCta.subtitle: Stop losing money on traditional bank fees. Talk to a human broker right now.
